zone_or_profile: left hillslope, channel strip, right hillslope
analytical_reference_application: Canopy bucket solution is evaluated per LAI zone; channel strip provides LAI=0 bypass.
notes: Use v-tilted static LAI raster for model run.

analytical_reference_application: Degree-day snow balance is evaluated uniformly or by elevation/temperature zone.
Green-Ampt solution is evaluated for homogeneous soil-zone cells.
notes: Use one or more soil classes with known Ks/psi/dtheta.

analytical_reference_application: Philip solution is evaluated for selected homogeneous cells.
Reference ET and extraction limits are evaluated using zone storage and albedo/LAI context.
notes: Still compare to independent ET/reference limiter.

analytical_reference_application: Linear reservoir recession is fitted to synthetic baseflow response.
Manufactured/recharge-mound solution is compared to groundwater profile response.
Ritter solution requires its own idealized geometry.
Non-breaking wave benchmark requires its own geometry.
Manning/GVF reference is compared to steady channel response.
Kinematic-wave timing/reference is sampled along v-tilted slopes after audit.
Diffusive-wave attenuation reference is sampled along v-tilted slopes after audit.
Channel conveyance/storage reference is applied to the v-tilted channel strip.
notes: Use channel width/depth settings when subgrid is active.

analytical_reference_application: Rating-curve ODE is applied to an outlet/reservoir control element.
Imposed hydrograph volume is routed through v-tilted domain ledger.
Stage-volume reference is evaluated against v-tilted channel geometry.
Tiny or zone-coded raster rainfall totals are integrated over v-tilted cell areas.
notes: Spatial rainfall validation remains exact bookkeeping.

analytical_reference_application: Wash-off ODE is evaluated using prescribed runoff flux over v-tilted cells.
Depth/velocity threshold classes are evaluated over synthetic v-tilted depth/velocity fields.
